hero.headline: When it breaks, we're *already on our way*
hero.subheadline: Same-day fixes across Columbia. No project too big, no repair too small — just results you can count on.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every Fix, Every Room
services_section.subheading: From the front door to the back fence — we handle it all

services.title: Home Repairs & Maintenance
services.description: Squeaky doors, loose railings, cracked drywall. The everyday fixes that keep your house running smooth.

services.title: Furniture Assembly & Installation
services.description: Flat-pack nightmares and heavy mounting jobs. We'll have it solid and level before you know it.

services.title: Painting & Touch-Ups
services.description: Fresh coats, color matching, and those tricky trim spots. Making your walls look brand new again.

services.title: Electrical & Plumbing Fixes
services.description: Outlets, switches, faucet drips, and running toilets. The quick fixes that save you big headaches.

about.heading: Built Different in Columbia
about.body: Express Handyman has earned 72 five-star reviews by showing up when we say we will and fixing things right the first time. Our Columbia neighbors know us for tackling everything from quick repairs to full project lists — always with the same attention to detail and clean-up when we're done.

reviews.name: Devon M.
reviews.text: Exceeded expectations completely. Punctual, detail-oriented, and fixed work another contractor messed up. Had my job done the next day.

reviews.name: Erik W.
reviews.text: Great work, super friendly, no stress at all. Even cleaned up after themselves. Already called them back for a second job.

reviews.name: Lexi J.
reviews.text: Professional from start to finish. Arrived on time, communicated clearly, got straight to work. Every task completed perfectly.

reviews.name: Paula H.
reviews.text: Amazing service! Fast response to my request and completely professional throughout the whole process.

service_areas.heading: All Around Columbia
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times across the Midlands

cta.heading: Ready to Cross It Off Your List?
cta.body: Call now for same-day service or get your free estimate online. We'll have it fixed before you know it.
